# Taylor Swift & Regret

Here are some ways "regret" connects to Taylor Swift:

## Songs About Regret
- **"Back to December"** - apologizing to ex Taylor Lautner
- **"The Moment I Knew"** - regret over a missed birthday
- **"New Romantics"** - turning heartbreak into something new
- **"Would've, Could've, Should've"** - regret over a past relationship
- **"Dear John"** - looking back on a damaging relationship

## Famous Lyrics on the Theme
> *"I wish I'd never ever seen your face"*
> *"Long story short, I survived"*
